description: DB-mode golden Q&A set for `eval.db_eval`. Unlike golden_set.json (offline, fixture filenames), relevant_doc_ids here must be the EVAL_TENANT_ID tenant's real ingested document filenames. Seeded from the Nest Coworking fixtures — edit to match your tenant. relevant_doc_ids empty + should_escalate true => the answer is NOT in the KB and the agent should escalate.

items.question: What are your opening hours on the weekend?
How much does a hot desk cost per month?
What is the price of a private office?
Can I bring my pet into the building?
Is there parking available and how much is it?
How do I book a meeting room?
Do dedicated desk members get 24/7 access?
Can you organise a rooftop birthday party for me next Friday?
What is your refund policy if I cancel an annual contract early?
